TUTORIAL_INTRO_LECCION:
Hi, I'm #0#! I'm here to show you how to manage your Empire.

Let's get started!
TUTORIAL_AYTO_LECCION:
This is your Town Hall. It will let you train villagers.

To select the Town Hall, click on it.
TUTORIAL_ALDEANO_LECCION:
The bottom panel will show the available actions.

Click on the villager button to begin training a villager.
TUTORIAL_SELECCIONAR_ALDEANO_LECCION:
Well done! You have trained a villager.

Select it using the mouse!
TUTORIAL_MOVER_ALDEANO_LECCION:
When you select a unit, you can move it by clicking on the desired place of the map.

Try it, click on the selected area!
TUTORIAL_ARBOL_LECCION:
Villagers perform collecting tasks!

Click on a tree to cut it!
TUTORIAL_ESPERA_LECCION: It will only take a few seconds... :)
TUTORIAL_RECOLECCION_LECCION: When the cutting has finished, click on the resource to pick up the wood.
TUTORIAL_CONSTRUIR_LECCION: Well done! Now I will show you how to create buildings. First, click the BUILD button.
TUTORIAL_CASA_LECCION: The next step is to select the desired building. Choose "House I".
TUTORIAL_COLOCAR_LECCION: Now click on the terrain to choose the placement of the house. The construction will begin!
TUTORIAL_CABALLERO_LECCION:
Well done! You are ready for your first battle.

Click on this knight to select it!
TUTORIAL_ATACAR_LECCION:
Trolls are your enemies! Defeat them or they will eliminate you!

Click on the troll to attack him!
TUTORIAL_BATALLA_LECCION: The units are attacking each other right now. The bars over them show their life. Don't worry, they are just weak trolls!
TUTORIAL_ENHORABUENA_LECCION: Very good! Now you're ready to build the biggest Social Empire on Facebook! Good luck!!
TUTORIAL_ESPERAR: Wait for a villager to collect
MISC_FAVOR: Do you want to accept the favor?
STORE_EDIFICIO_REFUERZOS: Allows you to get reinforcements from your allies!
STORE_EDIFICIO_SACRIFICIO: Sacrifice a unit and obtain some resources back
STORE_EDIFICIO_TESORO: Discovers a collectible item every day
STORE_EDIFICIO_ESTABLO: Allows you to convert swordmans and archers to mounted units.
STORE_EDIFICIO_CRIADERO: Put two animals inside to make them breed.
STORE_EDIFICIO_ZEPPELIN: Allows you to build a zeppelin to explore the Ancient Sea!
STORE_EDIFICIO_BARCO: Allows you to build a ship to explore the Great Sea!
STORE_EDIFICIO_COLISEO: Allows your villagers to move faster and to queue more resources to gather.
STORE_EDIFICIO_ESTATUA: The statue increases your limit of 3 attacks per day to 4.
STORE_EDIFICIO_MINA: Allows your villagers to mine gold and stone very fast.
STORE_EDIFICIO_SERRADERO: Allows your villagers to cut down trees very fast.
STORE_EDIFICIO_MERCADO_ALIADOS: Allows you to collect the resource you desire with the aid of your allies.
STORE_EDIFICIO_MAQUINA_DEL_TIEMPO: Allows to change the terrain theme of your map!
STORE_EDIFICIO_RECLUTAMIENTO_ALIADOS: Allows you to obtain powerful units through new recruits!
STORE_EDIFICIO_MESA_REDONDA: Allows you to obtain rewards through friends aid!
STORE_EDIFICIO_HECHICERIA: Allows you to learn and cast magic spells!
STORE_EDIFICIO_MARAVILLA_SOCIAL: Raises your population limit up to 50 more units!
STORE_EDIFICIO_IGLESIA_1: Healers can restore the health of your units
STORE_EDIFICIO_CATEDRAL: Monks convert enemy units to your units
STORE_EDIFICIO_IGLESIA: Healers can restore the health of your units
STORE_EDIFICIO_DEMOLICION: Kamikazes explode and harm all nearby units and buildings
STORE_EDIFICIO_ELEFANTE: Elephants stomp the ground to stun nearby opponents
STORE_EDIFICIO_CUARTEL1: Anubis Avatar creates 2 shadows of himself to annihilate the enemy!
STORE_EDIFICIO_TAMBORILERO: The drums inspire your troops making them attack faster!
STORE_EDIFICIO_RINOCERONTE: Rhinos charge their enemies and make them fly away
STORE_EDIFICIO_TORRE_MOVIL: Defensive tower that can move. You can use it in attacks
STORE_EDIFICIO_PIRAMIDE: Use Mummy's 4 special attacks to defeat your enemies
STORE_EDIFICIO_TORRE_HIELO: Freezes enemy units for a time. While frozen, enemy units cannot move or attack.
STORE_EDIFICIO_TORRE_AGUA: Unleashes waves of water to throw away incoming enemies.
STORE_EDIFICIO_FORTALEZA_1: Entrench archers inside to increase attack power!
STORE_EDIFICIO_TORRE_ACEITE: Puts a barrier of flaming oil in front of it. The oil sets enemies in flames.
STORE_EDIFICIO_HEROES_ALTAR: Allows you to acquire special heroes!
STORE_EDIFICIO_HEROES_CEMENTERIO: Allows you to revive your lost heroes.
STORE_EDIFICIO_MARAVILLA: This wonder increases the #0# population limit by #1#

POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_GOLEM: A dangerous Golden Golem kidnapped an Anubis Avatar!  Help the egyptian warriors to save him!

POPUP_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_YETI_NEGRO: Viking explorers have spotted a Black Yeti! Help them to defeat it!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_FIN_PIE_YETI_NEG: An axe viking will join your ranks as a token of gratitude for your help!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_VIBORA_GIGAN: Neptune, king of Atlantis, has summoned a Giant Vyper to conquer your empire! Kill it before it's too late!
POPUP_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_VIBORA_GIGANTE: Congratulations, you vanquished the Giant Vyper! Click on its nest!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_FIN_PIE_VIBORA_G: Neptune could not defeat you and returned back to the seas… plus you've found a dolphin fountain among the nest remains!
POPUP_MISION_FIREWORKS_FOOTER: Trolls have stolen the fireworks from a chinese camp when everybody was sleeping! Help them to retrieve it!
POPUP_MISION_VIKBEER_FOOTER:
Trolls stole the ale barrels from your Vicking friends!
Retrieve it so they can party again!
POPUP_MISION_FIREWORKS_UNIT: WE'LL HELP YOU ON THIS MISSION!
POPUP_MISION_VIKBEER_UNIT: ARRR! WE WANT OUR ALE BACK!
POPUP_MISION_FIREWORKS_FOOTER_END: The chinese warriors are happy again and give you a Dragon Statue to thank you for your help!
POPUP_MISION_VIKBEER_FOOTER_END: Vikings are happy again and can continue celebrating! They offer you a Viking Ship to thank you for your help!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_PRINCESA_END: WELL DONE! You rescued the princess! She joins your army to thank you for your help!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_ARQUEROS_END: WOW! You rescued the three archers! They now join your ranks as a token of gratitude!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_SOLDADOS_END: YOU ARRIVED ON TIME! You saved the soldiers from being boiled alive!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_TESORO_END: VICTORY! You retrieved the treasure stolen by the trolls!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_ALDEANOS_END: VERY WELL! Your rescued the villagers from a certain death!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_TROLL_END: BRAVO! You managed to save the troll! He will help you now!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_PRINCIPE_END: FANTASTIC! You saved your prince and now your empire can be properly managed again!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_FUEGO_END: AWESOME! You regained control of your wells again an could put off the fire on the fields and mill!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_CURANDEROS_E: PERFECT! You rescued the healers, and of them will join your ranks as a token of gratitude!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_PIEDRA_END: VERY WELL! You defeated the trolls and regained control of the stone mines!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_ALIADOS_END: BRILLIANT! You rescued your allies and they will help you to fight against the trolls now!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_ANIMALES_END: YOU DID IT! You saved the animals and now they are free again!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_ASEDIO_END: You retrieved the siege weapons and now you can use them against your enemies!
POPUP_MISION_CAMPAMENTO_PIE_ESTATUA_END: The statues hid treacherous skeletons and you defeat them all!
POPUP_MISION_THEMUMMY_FOOTER: Help the egiptians to retrieve the Gems of Power and prevent evil Anubis Priests from reviving his deceased Paraoh.
POPUP_MISION_THEMUMMY_FOOTER_END: YES! You killed the mummy! An egyptian joins your ranks to thank you for helping his people!
POPUP_MISION_AZTECALTAR_FOOTER: Take the sheeps and sacrifice them at the altar while you plead Aztec Gods to bring rain to your fields!
POPUP_MISION_AZTECALTAR_FOOTER_END: Aztec Gods will take rain to your fields to end with the hunger!
POPUP_MISION_ELFOSARBOL_FOOTER: Help the Elfs to destroy the infernal sculptures that drain the energy from the Life Trees!
POPUP_MISION_ELFOSARBOL_FOOTER_END: WELL DONE! You restored the Natural Balance on the woods. 2 Archer Elfs join your ranks as proof of gratitude!
POPUP_MISION_ELFOSARBOL_UNIT_SAY: WE ARE AT YOUR ORDERS, for the moment…
POPUP_MISION_CHINOSDRAGON_FOOTER: Three Draggies are wreaking havoc on fields and houses of your empire! Defeat them before they kill somebody!
POPUP_MISION_CHINOSDRAGON_FOOTER_END: GOOD JOB! You defeated the draggies, but the Furious Dragon fled to Nest Isle! Two grateful Chinese Archers join your ranks!
POPUP_MISION_CHINOSDRAGON_UNIT_SAY: HELP GOOD CHINESE, AND CHINESE WILL REWARD YOU!
POPUP_MISION_CHINOSDRAGON_BOSS_SAY:
YOU WON'T DEFEAT ME! I'll be waiting for you on my island...
If you dare to come, MUHAHAHA!!
POPUP_MISION_NEPTUCLEOPATRA_FOOTER: ¡Neptuno rescued Cleopatra from a shipwreck and now he has fallen in love with her! Help the egiptians to rescue her!
POPUP_MISION_NEPTUCLEOPATRA_FOOTER_END: WELL DONE! Neptune has fled to his dwelling in Mythical Isle… Follow him and defeat his army for good!
POPUP_MISION_NEPTUCLEOPATRA_UNIT_SAY: HELP US TO SAVE OUR QUEEN!
POPUP_MISION_ELFOSENT_FOOTER: The Ent has been bewitched by the Hell followers! Help the elfs to free him from the spell!
POPUP_MISION_ELFOSENT_FOOTER_END: You've destroyed the Hell servants and the Ent is now free! As a token of gratitude, and Elf Druid joins your ranks!
POPUP_MISION_ELFOSENT_UNIT_SAY: ¡LET'S FREE THE ENT FROM THE DEVIL SPELL!
POPUP_MISION_TESOROATLANTE_FOOTER: Help the Aztecs to retrieve their treasures, stolen by the Atlants from the sunken ship of Hernan Cortes!
POPUP_MISION_TESOROATLANTE_FOOTER_END: HURRAY! You helped the Aztecs to retrieve their treasures and they give you an Aztec Boss sculpture in return for your efforts!
POPUP_MISION_TESOROATLANTE_UNIT_SAY: HELP US TO RETRIEVE OUR TREASURES!
POPUP_MISION_BALROG_FOOTER: The Devil forces have sent the Balrog himself to defeat your empire! Inferno outsiders will join you to defeat him and his army!
POPUP_MISION_BALROG_FOOTER_END: CONGRATULATIONS! Balrog fled away claiming vengeance! An Inferno outsider will join your ranks to help you detect evil forces!
POPUP_MISION_BALROG_UNIT_SAY: WE'LL HELP YOU TO DEFEAT BALROG!
POPUP_MISION_MAGOSCORRUPTOS_FOOTER: A group of foul wizards stole the Orbs of Power. Retrieve them before the wreak havoc on your empire!
POPUP_MISION_MAGOSCORRUPTOS_FOOTER_END: YOU ARE THE BEST! You retrieved the Orbs of Power and defeated the Foul Wizard. The Red Wizard could be saved from his madness and joins your ranks!
POPUP_MISION_PERFORARROCAS_FOOTER: Help the Aztec warriors to defeat the ROCKDRILLER! Destroy the Serpent sculptures to get it out of its hole!
POPUP_MISION_PERFORARROCAS_FOOTER_END: YOU DID IT! The Rockdriller fled to Mineral Isle and now your empire is save! The aztec warriors join your ranks as token of their gratitude!
POPUP_MISION_DEMONPORTAL_FOOTER: Some Demonic Portals have appeared in you empire! Kill the demons that crossed and destroy all the doors!
POPUP_MISION_DEMONPORTAL_FOOTER_END: GREAT! You defeated all demons and destroyed the portals! Your empire is now save!
POPUP_SUPER_MISTERY_FOOTER: You will find your prizes in your storage!
POPUP_CEMENTERIO_DESCRIPCION: Here you can revive your units you've lost in battles!
STORE_EDIFICIO_CEMENTERIO: Here you can revive your units you've lost in battles!
POPUP_GRAVEYARD_HELP_TITLE: If you lose units during a combat, you can resurrect them at the Graveyard!
POPUP_GRAVEYARD_HELP_1: A portrait of your dead units and their number is displayed.
POPUP_GRAVEYARD_HELP_2: Resurrecting dead units costs half of their original price.
POPUP_GRAVEYARD_HELP_3: Click on the right button below the portrait of the unit to resurrect it using gold, food or cash.
POPUP_GRAVEYARD_HELP_4: You can also resurrect units with potions.
POPUP_GRAVEYARD_HELP_5: Ask your friends to send you potions using the 'Ask For' button at the lower right!
POPUP_GRAVEYARD_HELP_6: Once you have enough potions to resurrect a unit, the left button below the portrait (potion) will be highlighted.
POPUP_GRAVEYARD_HELP_7: Click on the potion button to revive a unit!

- Conquer the rest of enemies' empires on your island to progress to the next one!
- You can also attack players from other islands to get lots of experience and gold!
- Each time you conquer an Island you earn 1 cash and a unit!
- Try to make it to Island 1 and win amazing prizes along the way!

POPUP_SURVIVAL_MODE_TEXT:
- Protect the central Relic from enemy attacks!

- Resist as much time as possible and win a unit!

- Your army will be made of 30 of your most powerful units!!

- Tip: First defeat the Bosses to stop the 8-direction enemies spawning!

- You won't lose any unit for playing this game mode!! :)

- If you beat the time and win a unit, check your storage to get it!

- Beat your best time, take a picture and send it to our forums!

UNIT_WAREHOUSE_HELP_TEXT:
- Keep you units safe on the warehouse!

- There's no need to sacrifice your units because of lack of space!

- Click on a unit on your map and click on the warehouse to store it.

 - Click on a unit portrait to put it again on your map.

 - You can buy more space up to 200 slots!!

POPUP_CRIADERO_NOOBINFO: Press "take care" every 6 hours to get a powerful dragon.
DRAGON_NEST_HELP_TEXT:
- Press the 'Take Care' / 'Feed' button under the image. Look how the progress bar at the top fills up.
- Wait until the timer reaches 0:00:00 or press the 'Speed Up' button below to complete the step.
- Repeat this process 10 times and press the 'Get Dragon!' button to get your dragon!
- Each time you get a draggy or dragon, you'll unlock the next one on the portrait strip below!
-Hire friends for multiple speed up progress. The more friends, the more steps you'll progress!
POPUP_MEN_VS_WOMEN_DESC: Try out Social Wars today and enjoy some of our exclusive offers!
POPUP_CRIADERO_NOOBINFO2: Press "feed" every 6 hours to get a powerfull dragon.

POPUP_RIDER_TRAINING_INFO: Complete all the steps of the training to get the Dragon Rider and be able to upgrade your Dragon!
POPUP_DRAGON_TAMING_MOUNT: Mount a Rider on a Dragon
POPUP_DRAGON_TAMING_NEED: To mount a dragon with a rider, you have to put both units into this building. You will obtain the dragon with more power.
POPUP_DRAGON_TAMING_CLICK_TAME: Click on 'Ride the Dragon' to mount the dragon with the rider.
ALERT_DRAGON_RIDER_NOT_MATCHING: Your rider cannot mount this dragon. Check in the Rider Academy which dragons are a good match for him.
ALERT_DRAGON_RIDER_INCOMPLETE: Put one dragon and one rider in this building.
POPUP_DRAGON_TAMING_HELP:
- HOW TO RIDE A DRAGON


1. Once you have got your rider in the Rider Academy, select it and put it in the Dragon Riding.

 2. Add your dragon to the Dragon Riding so the Rider can ride it!

3. Remember that the Rider and Dragon must be compatible so the riding can be successfully completed (check the Rider Academy for more details).

4. Once you have both Rider and Dragon in the building, press the 'Ride the Dragon' button to get your super powerful new unit!
POPUP_RIDER_TRAINING_HELP_SELECT:
- HOW TO TRAIN A DRAGON RIDER

1. Select the Rider you like (warning: put the mouse over a Rider and you'll see the dragons he can ride below!)

2. You must demonstrate you are worthy of riding a dragon: complete all the adventures and reach the END! (each time you complete an adventure, your progress bar on top will fill out)

 3- You must wait some time before playing again (you also have a button to recover yourself quicker!)

4. When you complete the last adventure, press the Get Rider button to get your Dragon Rider!

5. Once you get your Rider, take it to the Dragon Riding Building! (check the Store)
POPUP_RIDER_TRAINING_HELP_TRAIN:
- HOW TO TRAIN A DRAGON RIDER

1. Select the Rider you like (warning: put the mouse over a Rider and you'll see the dragons he can ride below!)
2. You must demonstrate you are worthy of riding a dragon: complete all the adventures and reach the END! (each time you complete an adventure, your progress bar on top will fill out)
3. You must wait some time before playing again (you also have a button to recover yourself quicker!)
4. When you complete the last adventure, press the Get Rider button to get your Dragon Rider!
5. Once you get your Rider, take it to the Dragon Riding Building! (check the Store)
POPUP_RIDER_GAIN: This rider gives your dragon additional #0# attack and #1# health!

LIMIT_DAMAGE: Fill bar doing damage. When full, press bar to attack.
LIMIT_HEAL: Fill bar doing damage. When full, press bar to heal units.
LIMIT_STOMP: Fill bar doing damage. When full, press bar to charge.
STORE_DOME_PROTECTION: All your units within this dome will receive 50% less damage!!
STORE_DOME_TOWER_ENHANCER: This Tower Enhancer will make surrounding towers shoot 2x faster!!
LIMIT_HELP:
- Limit is the most powerful of all attacks.
- You can only find Limit attack on Dragons con Rider.
- There are 3 types of Limit: Charge, Ray Attack and Heal. Each dragon with rider uses one of these.
- Fill the bar button to activate Limit by killing enemies.
- Once it is activated click on the bar button to unleash the attack.
- Create your own Limit strategy attacking with different dragons with rider.

-Thus you'll get resources sooner! It also speeds up PvP, Chapters, Quests, Daily Bonus, Dragon Nest, Rider Academy and much more!

Help them to achieve their goal!
